name: ALP Rebalance Loop
description: Triggers ALP's rebalance tick every 5 minutes against the deployed Cloudflare Worker. Notifies a private Telegram chat ONLY when at least one position rebalanced (with the per-pool reason + new range). Failure branch alerts the same chat if the worker call errors. Auto-deploy via `pnpm deploy:keeperhub` (uses /api/workflows/create + PATCH; KH has no `kh workflow apply`).

secrets.name: ALP_WORKER_URL
secrets.description: host of the deployed worker, e.g. alp-agent.username.workers.dev

secrets.name: ALP_API_KEY
secrets.description: matches the worker's KEEPERHUB_API_KEY env var (NOT the kh_ org key)

secrets.name: TG_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: from @BotFather (long string starting with the bot's numeric ID)

secrets.name: TG_CHAT_ID
secrets.description: your private Telegram chat ID (numeric, found via getUpdates)
